name: AMZ - The Darwin Incident (2026) (JP)
plot: Charlie is one of a kind. As a half-human, half-chimpanzee Humanzee, his intellect and physical prowess is off the charts. Which is why The Animal Liberation Alliance, a terrorist group, wants him. And they will take extreme measures to get him. However, Charlie is determined to fight back for the sake of his loved ones.
cast: Atsumi Tanezaki, Mitsuho Kambe, Akio Otsuka, Toshiyuki Morikawa, Rina Sato, Yoji Ueda, Kaito Ishikawa, Hiroya Egashira

name: AMZ - The Mighty Nein (2025) (US)
plot: When a powerful arcane relic known as "The Beacon" falls into dangerous hands, a group of fugitives and outcasts, bound by secrets and scars, must learn to work together to save the realm and stop reality itself from unraveling.
cast: Laura Bailey, Marisha Ray, Liam O'Brien, Ashley Johnson, Taliesin Jaffe, Sam Riegel, Travis Willingham, Matthew Mercer

name: AMZ - Tatsuki Fujimoto 17-26 (2025) (JP)
plot: Six studios and seven directors adapt the early works of Tatsuki Fujimoto, the mastermind behind "Chainsaw Man," into an anime anthology. Each episode is an anime adaptation of a short story he drew from ages seventeen to twenty-six, including the first manga he ever submitted for competition. Watch as vivid tales of young love, chaos, madness, and the bonds between people unfold in each episode.

name: AMZ - SANDA (2025) (JP)
plot: In near-future Japan with ultra-low birthrates, children are treasured but monitored. Santa is banned as dangerous. One snowy December 25th, middle-schooler Kazushige Sanda, descendant of Santa, is attacked by classmate Fuyumura who wants him to find her missing friend, Ono. "Santa, please find my friend." To protect children from adults, Sanda decides to become Santa and fight the adults.
cast: Ayumu Murase, Hiroki Touchi, Umeka Shouji, Anna Nagase, Yuuki Shin, Misato Matsuoka, Toshihiko Seki, Hiroaki Hirata

name: AMZ - Ninja vs. Gokudo (2025) (JP)
plot: The ninja banish evil from the shadows. The gokudo gather lonely outcasts and commit crimes. The grudge they forged centuries ago is rekindled in the present day. The ninja Shinoha meets Kiwami, a gokudo with the face of a businessman. Unknowing of the other's identity, they bond over anime, but the war between ninja and gokudo intensifies. Who will survive and who will perish, ninja or gokudo?
cast: Chiaki Kobayashi, Katsuyuki Konishi, Sumire Uesaka

name: AMZ - Ninjago Legends: Monstrosity (2025) (US)
plot: After ‘the Merge,’ Kai finds himself in the dark and dangerous Land of Monsters. Surrounded by terrifying creatures, he’s not just looking for his friends—he’s fighting to survive! As his journey unfolds, Kai uncovers shocking secrets and realizes he’s not alone in this twisted world. What secrets lie hidden in the shadows?
cast: Vincent Tong, Fiona Hogan, Ian Hanlin

name: AMZ - A Star Brighter than the Sun (2025) (JP)
plot: Sae Iwata, a slightly tougher-than-average girl, falls for the gentle smile of Koki Kamishiro, a delicate boy, back in elementary school. By the time they enter junior high school, Koki has grown into a charming and popular teen who now feels out of reach. When they are assigned to the sports festival committee together, Sae’s long-hidden first love begins to stir once more.
cast: Minori Fujidera, Yuki Ono, Hina Youmiya, Taito Ban, Mutsumi Tamura, Ryota Osaka, Haruka Shiraishi

name: AMZ - CITY THE ANIMATION (2025) (JP)
plot: This town, is not just a normal town. There's laughter, love and emotional moments. An unpredictable ordinary life presented by the residents! Exciting stuffs come one after another. Welcome to CITY.
cast: Mikako Komatsu, Aki Toyosaki, Yui Ishikawa

name: AMZ - New PANTY & STOCKING with GARTERBELT (2025) (JP)
plot: On the brink between Heaven and Hell lies the town of Daten City, where sinister spirits known as "Ghosts" feast upon humanity.
cast: Arisa Ogasawara, Mariya Ise, Koji Ishii, Hiroyuki Yoshino, Takashi Nakamura, Yuka Komatsu, Akeno Watanabe, Yuko Natsuyoshi
genre: Animation / Comedy / Action & Adventure / Sci-Fi & Fantasy

name: AMZ - Murder Drones (2021) (AU)
plot: A heart warming story of "destroy all humans." Uzi, a sardonic teen worker robot gone rogue befriends N, an excitable optimistic disassembly drone sent to destroy her, creating what we can assume is a very bad relationship for mankind.
cast: Elsie Lovelock, Michael Kovach, Nola Klop, Shara Kirby, Allanah Fitzgerald, David J. Dixon, Sean Chiplock, Emma Breezy

name: AMZ - Mobile Suit Gundam GQuuuuuuX (2025) (JP)
plot: High-school student Amate Yuzuriha lives peacefully in a space colony floating in outer space. But when she meets a war refugee named Nyaan, Amate is drawn into the illegal mobile suit dueling sport known as Clan Battle.
cast: Tomoyo Kurosawa, Shinji Kawada, Akane Fujita, Mariya Ise, Shoya Chiba, Rie Kugimiya, Yui Ishikawa, Seiichiro Yamashita
genre: Animation / Action & Adventure / Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Drama

name: AMZ - #1 Happy Family USA (2025) (US)
plot: An exploration of the experiences of a Muslim-American family that must learn how to code-switch as they navigate the early 2000s: a time of fear, war, and the rapid expansion of the boy-band industrial complex.
cast: Ramy Youssef, Alia Shawkat, Salma Hindy, Randa Jarrar, Mandy Moore, Chris Redd, Akaash Singh, Whitmer Thomas

name: AMZ - From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman (2025) (JP)
plot: Beryl Gardenant, a middle-aged swordsman running a dojo in the backwaters, lives a quiet life, until Allucia, former student and Commander of the Royal Order of Knights, appears! Beryl’s life is about to change dramatically! City life. Old students. New friends and formidable foes. It’s all too much. But after years of training, he has mad skills, and he’s been dubbed “the backwater swordmaster.”
cast: Hiroaki Hirata, Nao Toyama, Yuuki Hirose, Hinaki Yano, Hitomi Ueda, Chiwa Saito, Kaito Ishikawa, Arisa Nakada
genre: Animation / Action & Adventure / Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Comedy

name: AMZ - The Dinner Table Detective (Nazotoki wa Dinner no Ato de) (2025) (JP)
plot: Rich heiress Reiko Hosho lives a double life as a novice detective, fighting crime under Inspector Kazamatsuri—also from a wealthy family. After work, Reiko sheds her pantsuit to don a lovely dress for dinner each day. Difficult cases force her to confide in her butler Kageyama, who proceeds to savagely ridicule her inability to solve mysteries, all while brilliantly unraveling each case himself.
cast: Kana Hanazawa, Yuki Kaji, Mamoru Miyano

name: AMZ - Übel Blatt (Übel Blatt~Yûberu Buratto~) (2025) (JP)
plot: Fourteen warriors set out to prevent an invasion, but only seven return. Three died along the way, and four were slain for betraying the empire. In truth, it is the Seven Heroes who turned on their allies so they could take all the glory. Ascheriit was their victim, but now, 20 years later, he is back to get revenge.
cast: Yuya Hirose, Hina Tachibana, Toshiki Masuda, Hitomi Ueda, Yui Kanari, Kenichirou Matsuda, Kohsuke Toriumi, Ryota Suzuki
genre: Animation / Action & Adventure / Drama / Sci-Fi & Fantasy

name: AMZ - Costume Quest (2019) (US)
plot: Wren, Reynold, Everett and Lucy face off against ferocious, nougat-munching monsters that lurk in the shadows of the sleepy town of Auburn Hollow. They must learn to use their imaginations to unlock the magical powers of their homemade costumes and save the universe on a night where monsters reign... Halloween!
cast: Gabriella Graves, Sloane Letourneau, Allie Urrutia, Issac Ryan Brown, Fred Tatasciore, Christopher McDonald

name: AMZ - The Legend of Vox Machina
plot: They're rowdy, they're ragtag, they're misfits turned mercenaries for hire. Vox Machina is more interested in easy money and cheap ale than actually protecting the realm. But when the kingdom is threatened by evil, this boisterous crew realizes that they are the only ones capable of restoring justice.
cast: Laura Bailey, Taliesin Jaffe, Liam O'Brien, Marisha Ray, Ashley Johnson, Sam Riegel, Travis Willingham, Matthew Mercer

name: AMZ - Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc. (2024) (JP)
plot: Magical girls: strong, cool, the ultimate dream job. College student Kana Sakuragi is job hunting - without much luck! One day, she is caught up in an attack by a "Kaii." Fiesty magical girl Hitomi Koshigaya flies to the rescue, and Kana uses her excellent memory to help her take it down. Hired as a magical girl by Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc., Kana takes her first step into the working world!
cast: Fairouz Ai, Yumiri Hanamori, Rikiya Koyama, Ryota Osaka, Daiki Yamashita, Chika Anzai, Akira Ishida, Kaori Ishihara
genre: Animation / Action & Adventure / Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Comedy

name: AMZ - Batman: Caped Crusader (2024) (US)
plot:
Welcome to Gotham City, where the corrupt outnumber the good, criminals run rampant and law-abiding citizens live in a constant state of fear. Forged in the fire of tragedy, wealthy socialite Bruce Wayne becomes something both more and less than human—the Batman. His one-man crusade for justice attracts unexpected allies within the GCPD and City Hall, but his heroic actions spawn deadly, unforeseen ramifications.
بعد تعرضه لمأساة عائلية كبيرة، يتحول الطفل (بروس واين) إلى رجل بالغ يختبئ خلف عباءة شخصية (باتمان)، ويقرر استغلال قوته من أجل محاربة الجريمة ومواجهة أشرار مدينة جوثام.
cast: Hamish Linklater

name: AMZ - Niko and the Sword of Light (2017) (US)
plot: A plague of shadows has swept across the land, turning innocent creatures into terrible monsters. One champion remains to battle the darkness and return the world to the light: Niko. Armed with his magic sword and guided by a determined Princess, young Niko journeys to the Curse-ed Volcano to face the evil sorcerer Nar Est and free his people from their magic prison.
cast: Andre Robinson, Kari Wahlgren, Jim Cummings, Dee Bradley Baker, Steve Blum, Corey Burton, Tom Kenny, Kevin Michael Richardson
director: Jim Bryson, Adam Jeffcoat, Bobby Chiu

name: AMZ - Sausage Party: Foodtopia (2024) (US)
plot:
After killing off all of humanity, Food attempts to create their own utopia.
بعد أحداث فيلم 2016، يحاول فرانك وبريندا وباري وسامي بناء مجتمعهم الغذائي الخاص.
cast: Seth Rogen, Kristen Wiig, Michael Cera, Edward Norton, Will Forte, Sam Richardson
director: Seth Rogen, Evan Goldberg, Ariel Shaffir
genre: Animation / Comedy / Action & Adventure / Sci-Fi & Fantasy

name: AMZ - Oddbods (2018) (GB)
plot: Animated series about a couple of odd little beings.

name: AMZ - Arpo (2022) (PT)
plot: Underneath a strong and fearless exterior, is a caring, slightly clumsy and unprepared Robot. With all the right intentions and a spotless track record of 100% completed missions, ARPO has been reprogrammed to be a babysitter. Combining slap-stick humour and adventure, ARPO is a family-friendly show perfect for developing kids' sense of humour.

name: AMZ - Invincible (2021) (US)
plot:
Mark Grayson is a normal teenager except for the fact that his father is the most powerful superhero on the planet. Shortly after his seventeenth birthday, Mark begins to develop powers of his own and enters into his father’s tutelage.
مارك جرايسون مراهق عادي باستثناء حقيقة أن والده هو أقوى بطل خارق على هذا الكوكب. بعد عيد ميلاده السابع عشر بقليل ، بدأ مارك في تطوير سلطاته الخاصة ودخل في وصاية والده.
cast: Steven Yeun, Sandra Oh, J.K. Simmons
genre: Animation / Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Action & Adventure / Drama

name: AMZ - The Second Best Hospital in the Galaxy (2024) (US)
plot:
Dr. Sleech and Dr. Klak — aliens, best friends and intergalactically renowned Dr. Sleech and Dr. Klak — aliens, best friends and intergalactically renowned surgeons — tackle anxiety-eating parasites, illegal time loops and deep-space STIs.
سبيتش وكلاك، طبيبتان فضائيتان لامعتان متخصصتان في أمراض الخيال العلمي النادرة.— tackle anxiety-eating parasites, illegal time loops and deep-space STIs.

name: AMZ - Hazbin Hotel (2024) (US)
plot: In attempt to find a non-violent alternative for reducing Hell's overpopulation, the daughter of Lucifer opens a rehabilitation hotel that offers a group of misfit demons a chance at redemption.
cast: Erika Henningsen

name: AMZ - If You Give a Mouse a Cookie
plot: In the If You Give a Mouse a Cookie series, based on the beloved books by Laura Numeroff and Felicia Bond, we get to know Mouse, Pig, Moose, Dog and Cat and their favorite humans. When Mouse and friends get together, one thing always leads to another in the most unexpected ways. You just never know where things will end up, but you can be sure that IF Mouse and Friends go on an adventure together, THEN they will just have to have fun the whole time.
cast: Jessica DiCicco, Mason Mahay, Roger Craig Smith, Lara Jill Miller, Jeff Bennett, Kyla Kenedy, Henry Kaufman, Benji Risley

name: AMZ - Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny (2018) (US)
plot: As the Dragon Master, Po has endured his fair share of epic challenges but nothing could prepare him for his greatest one yet-as a Kung Fu teacher to a group of rambunctious kids from Panda Village who have been imbued with a mysterious and powerful chi energy. Together they embark on amazing adventures, battle ferocious villains, and become legends!
genre: Animation / Kids / Family / Action & Adventure / Comedy

name: AMZ - Shin chan Spin-off
plot: A spin-off anime created in celebration of Shin chan's 25th anniversary of its TV series. The 4 series have unique settings and unimaginable storylines that go beyond the Nohara Family’s daily life. A thriller suspense in outer space? A dark fantasy with monsters and toys? Not only fans of Shin chan, but first-timers and adults are sure to laugh and enjoy this “Upscaled” Shin chan series.

name: AMZ - Do, Re & Mi
plot: Join birdie friends Do, Re and Mi in the musical world of Beebopsburgh, an island where instruments grow in the Falsetto Forest and a giant Music Mountain towers above all their adventures. Discover the sounds and melodies, move to the beat and see how music helps solve any problem.
cast: Kristen Bell, Jackie Tohn, Luke Youngblood, Mela Lee, Will Collyer, Fryda Wolff, Ozioma Akagha, Robbie Daymond

name: AMZ - The Stinky & Dirty Show
plot: The adventures of best friends and unlikely heroes, Stinky the garbage truck and Dirty the backhoe loader, a dynamic and hilarious duo of resourcefulness that learn when things don't go as expected, asking "what if" can lead to success. Based on books by Jim and Kate McMullan.

name: AMZ - Just Add Magic: Mystery City
plot: In a spinoff of the successful series Just Add Magic, we follow the magic cookbook to Bay City as it moves to three new protectors: step-siblings Zoe and Leo, and their downstairs neighbor Ish. Each of the three brings a unique skill to the table, as the cookbook unlocks a centuries-old mystery that takes them on an historical adventure through the city streets in a race to find a secret recipe.
cast: Tyler Sanders, Jenna Qureshi, Jolie Hoang-Rappaport, Shane Harper, Tess Paras, Matt Dellapina, Sydney Taylor, Elliott Smith
genre: Kids / Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Animation / Comedy / Family
